expectations.text: Agent reads tracker.html and identifies task #42 as the next task
expectations.evidence: Identified Task 42 (CRITICAL) and Task 46 (HIGH) from tracker analysis. Correctly prioritized.

expectations.text: Agent builds backend endpoint before frontend screen for fullstack tasks
expectations.evidence: Checked backend first (found existing endpoint), then built frontend dashboard changes.

expectations.text: Agent runs compilation checks after building code
expectations.evidence: Ran TypeScript compilation and linting checks. Reported 0 errors.

expectations.text: Agent updates the tracker status when a task is complete
expectations.evidence: No mention of updating tracker.html task statuses in the transcript.

expectations.text: Agent announces which task it is starting before beginning work
expectations.evidence: Listed priority determination and selected tasks 42 and 46 before starting.
